title: Stuffed Tomatoes
excerpt: Ingredients 4 medium large firm tomatoes 60 g breadcrumbs 1 garlic clove finely chopped 60 ml finely chopped parsley 30 ml thyme 30 ml chopped basil 60 ml melted butter 100 ml mature cheddar cheese 60 ml blue cheese, crumbled 60 ml mozzarella salt and pepper Method Cut off the top quarter of the tomato …
html:
Ingredients

  • 4 medium large firm tomatoes
  • 60 g breadcrumbs
  • 1 garlic clove, finely chopped
  • 60 ml finely chopped parsley
  • 30 ml thyme
  • 30 ml chopped basil
  • 60 ml melted butter
  • 100 ml mature cheddar cheese
  • 60 ml blue cheese, crumbled
  • 60 ml mozzarella
  • salt and pepper

Method

Cut off the top quarter of the tomato (keep the little lids).

Hollow out the tomatoes and keep the tomato flesh, roughly chopped. Salt and pepper the inside of the tomato.

In a mixing bowl, combine the rest of the ingredients along with the roughly chopped tomato flesh, and fill the tomatoes.

Bake the tomatoes in a greased oven dish and put the little lids back on.

Bake for 30 minutes at 180 degrees Celsius.

Easy!
